mechanism: Creating a landing zone generates a .bicepparam and a dedicated lz-*.yml workflow from templates. Placeholders are replaced with request inputs. The result is committed as a PR.
why: A dedicated workflow per landing zone gives each an independent deployment lifecycle and visible CI/CD status — a shared deployer would couple their lifecycles.

related.note: Profile must exist before scaffolding — provides appName and contacts.
Each landing zone carries its own workflow and parameters.
Generated workflow owns its landing zone's full deployment.

violations: Parameter file without a matching lz-*.yml workflow.
Generated workflow name not matching lz-* prefix — breaks fan-out discovery.
